# ALAssetsFilter

**Class**

`ALAssetsFilter` encapsulates filtering criteria to be used when retrieving assets from a group.

## Declaration

```swift
class ALAssetsFilter
```

## Overview



You use filters with the [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsGroup/setAssetsFilter(_:)] method in [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsGroup].

## Creating Filters

- **allAssets()**: Returns a filter that gets all assets in the assets group.
- **allPhotos()**: Returns a filter that gets all photos in the assets group.
- **allVideos()**: Returns a filter that gets all videos in the assets group.

## Classes

- **ALAsset**: An `ALAsset` object represents a photo or a video managed by the Photo application.
- **ALAssetRepresentation**: An `ALAssetRepresentation` object encapsulates one of the representations of a given [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAsset] object.
- **ALAssetsGroup**: An `ALAssetsGroup` object represents an ordered set of the assets managed by the Photos application. The order of the elements is the same as the user sees in the Photos application. An asset can belong to multiple assets groups.
- **ALAssetsLibrary**: An instance of `ALAssetsLibrary` provides access to the videos and photos that are under the control of the Photos application.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
